awards.name: Joseph Peters
awards.detail: Range: 35 percentile points between best and worst

awards.detail: Volatility: 0.0 — nearly the same percentile every week

awards.title: Women's Wildcard

awards.name: Amy van der Walt

awards.name: Kira Dugall
